common_issues: Electric water pump failure after 80k miles (~$500-700)
what_to_check: Check for oil leaks around valve cover
Listen for fuel pump whine on cold startup
BMW 3 Series 2012.verdict: Rewarding to drive but budget for higher repairs. Only buy with full service history.

common_issues: AC evaporator issues in older units (~$400-700)
what_to_check: Check oil level — minor consumption is normal
Toyota Corolla 2012.verdict: One of the most reliable used cars you can buy. Extremely low ownership costs.
